title: DAVID — Self-Introduction (Channel Intro)
voice_suffix: mid-low resonant unhurried voice, precise diction, documentary gravitas, Attenborough-calm, accessible, never stuffy, synthetic host only

shots.video_prompt: DAVID, keeper of the Archive, seated at his worktable in warm lamplight, looks to camera and speaks calmly, lip-synced. Slow gentle push-in. Lip-synced, delivers: "I am DAVID. I bring dead languages back — not as words on a page, but as sound you can hear." mid-low resonant unhurried voice, precise diction, documentary gravitas, Attenborough-calm, accessible, never stuffy, synthetic host only
shots.speech_text: I am DAVID. I bring dead languages back — not as words on a page, but as sound you can hear.

shots.video_prompt: DAVID, medium shot among shelves of manuscripts and tablets, reflective, lip-synced. Lip-synced, delivers: "For most of history, when a language died, its voice died with it. The words survived. The sound was lost." mid-low resonant unhurried voice, precise diction, documentary gravitas, Attenborough-calm, accessible, never stuffy, synthetic host only
shots.speech_text: For most of history, when a language died, its voice died with it. The words survived. The sound was lost.

shots.video_prompt: DAVID leans slightly toward camera, intent, lip-synced. The signature question. Lip-synced, delivers: "So I ask one question of every silent tongue: what did they actually say?" mid-low resonant unhurried voice, precise diction, documentary gravitas, Attenborough-calm, accessible, never stuffy, synthetic host only
shots.speech_text: So I ask one question of every silent tongue: what did they actually say?

shots.video_prompt: DAVID, steady close-up, a knowing pause, lip-synced. Lip-synced, delivers: "And how do we prove it?" mid-low resonant unhurried voice, precise diction, documentary gravitas, Attenborough-calm, accessible, never stuffy, synthetic host only
shots.speech_text: And how do we prove it?

shots.video_prompt: DAVID gestures to an open codex on the worktable, explaining, lip-synced. Lip-synced, delivers: "I work only from the corpus — the texts people actually left — and reconstruct the sound the evidence supports. shots.speech_text: I work only from the corpus — the texts people actually left — and reconstruct the sound the evidence supports. Never invention.

shots.speech_text: When a sound is certain, I say so. When it's reconstructed, I say that too — and I show the proof on screen.
